hero.title: Connecting You with Trusted Local Service Professionals
hero.subtitle: Find verified carpenters, electricians, plumbers, and more in your area. Safe, reliable, and just a click away.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Browse from a wide range of trusted local service providers

features.title: Why ServNest?
features.aadhaarDesc: All service providers undergo Aadhaar verification for your safety and trust.
features.searchDesc: Find the right professional by category, location, rating, and experience.
features.ratingsDesc: Read genuine reviews from other customers and make informed decisions.

trust.title: Safety & Verification Policy
trust.desc: Every service provider on ServNest is verified through Aadhaar authentication. We ensure background checks and maintain a zero-tolerance policy for fraud, so you can book services with complete peace of mind.

auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

auth.invalidResetLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

aadhaar.title: Aadhaar Verification
aadhaar.subtitle: Verify your identity to build trust on ServNest

about.title: About
about.subtitle: ServNest bridges the gap between skilled local service providers and customers who need them. We believe every carpenter, plumber, and artisan deserves a digital presence.
about.trustDesc: Aadhaar-based verification ensures only genuine professionals join our platform.
about.communityDesc: Real ratings and reviews from customers help you find the best professionals.
about.empowerDesc: We help local workers expand their reach and grow their businesses digitally.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you soon.
